text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 300 

REDUCED_OOPT_CS 

LABEL: Indicates Whether Part D Plan Offers Reduced Post Out-of-Pocket (OOP) Threshold Cost-Sharing 
Amounts 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan offers reduced cost sharing in the post out-of-pocket 
threshold (catastrophic) phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 
9
